category_title: Disengaged adolescent with behavioral history and word-skipping habits
minimal_context: Derek is taking a World History exam independently in the classroom.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Here is your World History exam. Please read the questions and begin.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Slouches and crosses arms) I can never remember these lessons. It just makes me tense and uncomfortable.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Just read the first section and try your best.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Reads the page very quickly) I'm just trying to finish this as fast as possible.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Look at question number three again.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I somehow just skip over words on tests. I look back at the question and realize I never knew it said that. I'm done with this.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Here is your World History exam. Please read the questions and begin.

STUDENT: (Slouches and crosses arms) I can never remember these lessons. It just makes me tense and uncomfortable.

TUTOR: Just read the first section and try your best.

STUDENT: (Reads the page very quickly) I'm just trying to finish this as fast as possible.

TUTOR: Look at question number three again.

STUDENT: I somehow just skip over words on tests. I look back at the question and realize I never knew it said that. I'm done with this.
